prototypes.title: Inflatable Wound Shield
prototypes.description: A self-inflating wound-protective device that shields injured or sutured skin from external impact while maintaining a sterile healing environment.

prototypes.title: Smart Helmet Strap System
prototypes.description: An intelligent emergency-responsive helmet strap that automatically tightens during an accident to enhance rider safety.

prototypes.title: Foot Drop Assistive Device
prototypes.description: A shoe-mounted assistive mechanism that helps individuals with impaired dorsiflexion walk more naturally by restoring foot lift during gait.
